movie.title: Scandalous Emanuelle - Voglia Di Guardare (1986) Dual Audio [Hindi ORG & ENG] WEB-DL 480p, 720p & 1080p | GDRive
movie.synopsis: Voglia di guardare, also known as Midnight Gigolo and Peep Show, is a 1986 Italian erotic film directed by Joe D’Amato. A distinguished surgeon, married to a beautiful woman, has the habit of watching his wife in secret. The man decides to grant his wife to the owner of a refined brothel to be able to observe her from behind a mirror.
